top_signals.title: China Touts Yuan as US Ups Strong Dollar: 3-Minutes MLIV
top_signals.summary: Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson and Paul Dobson break down today's key themes for analysts and investors on "Bloomberg: The Opening Trade." (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Stocks Fall as Samsung Leads Selloff in Chips: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Stocks fell as volatility hit chipmakers anew after blowout earnings from Samsung Electronics Co. left investors wanting even more. Bonds fell as oil rose by the most in more than a week.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Microsoft testing new Cloud Rebuild Windows 11 recovery feature
top_signals.summary: Microsoft has begun testing the Cloud Rebuild recovery feature in the latest Windows 11 Insider Preview builds released for users in the Experimental channel. [...]
